title: TheBlockAcademy
description: Released for TheBlock.Academy community, a curated Fabric 1.21.1 creative building modpack with 146 mods including Axiom, Macaw's suite, Chipped, Distant Horizons, and proximity voice chat.
body:
# A Creative Building Modpack for Multiplayer assembled for a new 2026+ community: [The Block Academy](https://theblock.academy/utm_source=modrinth&utm_medium=description_intro)

***

TBA is a curated Fabric 1.21.1 modpack designed for creative multiplayer servers. Whether you're building elaborate structures, running a community server, or just want a polished vanilla+ experience with 189 carefully selected mods.

***

🏆 Recognition System (Core Curriculum)

A unique recognition system that celebrates craft, teaching, and community — not grinding.

*   /submit "Build Name" — Submit builds for AI-assisted review by slashAI (Claude Sonnet 4.5)
*   /titles — Browse and equip earned titles that display in chat
*   /nominate — Recognize peers for mentoring, teaching, and collaboration
*   /welcome — Multi-page onboarding for new players (auto-shows on first join, press H to reopen)
*   Custom TBA splash screen during game loading
*   HUD auto-hides during screenshot capture for clean submissions
*   Titles sync with Discord and display on the [Honor Roll](https://theblock.academy/honor-roll?utm_source=modrinth&utm_medium=description_honor_roll) page

***

📹 StreamCraft Live — Video Streaming in Minecraft

Real-time video communication powered by LiveKit WebRTC:

*   Webcam streaming — See teammates face-to-face with fullbright billboards (visible even at night)
*   Screen sharing — Project onto StreamCraft Blocks with configurable size, distance, and horizontal offset
*   StreamCraft Blocks — Disguise as 11 different vanilla blocks (flower pot, planks, stone, bookshelves, and more)
*   Dynamic illumination — Active streams emit light level 12, lighting up the area around them
*   "Who can see me?" — Live viewer list in your HUD while streaming
*   Privacy-first — "How It Works" info modal with consent gate on first use
*   Proximity awareness — Server tracks who's nearby so you only stream to relevant players
*   1080p capture — High-quality video at 8 Mbps bitrate

***

🎬 Cinematics & Recording

*   ReplayMod — Timeline-based recording with keyframed cameras and video export
*   Better Third Person — 360° orbit camera with independent rotation
*   Stable Cam — Smooth cinematic camera mode
*   Camera Utils — Freecam and camera controls
*   First-person Model — See your own body in first person
*   Not Enough Animations — Player animations for eating, map holding, and more
*   AutoHUD — Auto-hiding HUD for clean recordings
*   Camera Overhaul — Tilting and swaying camera effects

***

🎨 Building & Decoration

Over 11,000 decorative block variants from Chipped, plus furniture and architectural pieces from:

*   Macaw's Complete Suite — Doors, Windows, Bridges, Roofs, Fences, Trapdoors, Furniture, Lights, Paths & Pavings, Paintings, Holidays
*   Handcrafted — 250+ fantasy/medieval furniture pieces
*   Adorn — Chairs, sofas, tables, shelves, kitchen blocks
*   Supplementaries + Amendments — Jars, signs, pulleys, cages, wall lanterns, and 100+ utility items
*   Excessive Building — 100+ vanilla-style blocks with hammer/wrench tools
*   ReFramed — Copy any block's appearance onto stairs, slabs, fences
*   Enchanted Vertical Slabs — Place slabs vertically with enchantment support
*   Diagonal Fences + Diagonal Windows + Diagonal Walls — Full diagonal building support
*   Clutter, Little Joys, WindChime — Small ambient details for polished builds
*   Fetzi's Asian Decoration — Asian-themed decor blocks
*   Beautify, Dusty Decorations, Sooty Chimneys — Weathered and aged aesthetics
*   VerdantVibes — Decorative plants and vegetation
*   Continuity — Connected textures for glass panes, bookshelves, and more

Building Tools:

*   Axiom — Modern all-in-one editor with real-time previews, terraforming, and sculpting
*   Litematica — Schematic display and building guides
*   Effortless Structure — Mirrors, arrays, and build modes
*   FallingTree — Chop the bottom log and the whole tree falls
*   Bridging Mod — Bedrock-style reach-around block placement
*   Easy Magic — Enchanting table QoL (no bookshelves needed to see enchants)
*   Trade Cycling — Cycle villager trades without breaking workstations

***

🔊 Audio & Immersion

*   Sound Physics Remastered — Realistic reverb and sound occlusion
*   AmbientSounds — Dynamic soundscapes based on biome, weather, and time
*   Presence Footsteps — Material-aware footstep sounds
*   Cool Rain — Material-specific rain sounds (wood, stone, metal)
*   Sounds — 170+ UI and interaction sounds
*   Visuality + Particle Rain + Falling Leaves — Enhanced ambient particles
*   Fabric Seasons — Four seasons with visual and gameplay changes
*   3D Skin Layers — Renders skin layers with depth
*   Eating Animation — Visible eating and drinking actions

***

⚡ Performance Optimized

Runs smoothly thanks to an enhanced performance stack:

*   Sodium, Lithium, FerriteCore, ModernFix, Krypton — Core optimizations
*   C2ME — Multi-core chunk generation
*   ImmediatelyFast — Immediate mode rendering optimization
*   BadOptimizations — Micro-optimizations for various game systems
*   Entity Culling — Skip rendering off-screen entities
*   Enhanced Block Entities — Faster block entity rendering
*   Clumps — Merges XP orbs to reduce entity lag

Distant Horizons extends your view distance with LOD rendering — see terrain for miles without killing your FPS.

***

🎮 Quality of Life

*   REI — Recipe viewer and item browser
*   WTHIT — Block and entity tooltips
*   JourneyMap — Full-featured world map with waypoints
*   AppleSkin — Food and hunger visualization
*   ItemSwapper — Quick block palette switching
*   Carry On — Pick up and carry blocks, chests, and mobs
*   Sit — Right-click stairs and slabs to sit
*   InvMove — Move while inventory is open
*   Block Runner — Run faster on path blocks
*   Mouse Wheelie — Inventory scrolling, sorting, and refilling
*   Blur+ — GUI background blur effect
*   Smooth Swapping — Animated item movement in inventories
*   Status Effect Bars — Duration bars on status effect icons
*   Paginated Advancements — Better advancement screen with pagination
*   Stack to Nearby Chests — Terraria-style deposit items
*   Crash Assistant — Helpful GUI after game crashes
*   Leaf Me Alone — Ride through leaves on horses/boats
*   Leaves Be Gone — Quick leaf decay after tree chopping

***

👥 Multiplayer Ready

*   Proximity Voice — Simple Voice Chat with interaction support
*   Land Claims — Flan for protection
*   Live Web Map — BlueMap
*   Sleep Voting — Better Sleep
*   Discord Bridge — Fabricord + Discord RPC status
*   Lootr — Per-player loot in chests (no stealing!)

***

🎁 Content & Farming

*   Farmer's Delight + More Delight — Cooking and farming expansion
*   Let's Do Series — Bakery, Vinery, Brewery, Meadow, Beach Party, Farm & Charm
*   Storage Drawers — Compact item storage
*   Traveler's Backpack — Wearable backpacks with fluid storage
*   Joy of Painting — Paint custom pictures on canvases
*   Camerapture — Take in-game photos as decorations
*   WaterFrames — Display images and videos on screens
*   VinURL — Play audio from URLs on note blocks (YouTube, SoundCloud, direct links)
*   Immersive Paintings — Upload custom images as paintings
*   Genshin Instruments + Even More Instruments — Playable instruments with MIDI support
*   Friends and Foes — Mob vote mobs (Copper Golem, Mooblooms, and more)
*   Illager Invasion — New illager types and boss encounters
*   Do A Barrel Roll — Enhanced elytra flight control with roll mechanics
*   Naturally Trimmed + Trimmable Tools — Armor trims on mobs and tools

***

🌈 Shaders Included

*   BSL v10.0 (default)
*   Complementary Reimagined r5.6.1
*   Photon v1.2a — Gameplay-focused with colored lighting
*   Solas Shader v3.1c — Fantasy stylized

***

📋 Requirements

*   Minecraft 1.21.1 (Java Edition)
*   Fabric Loader 0.18.3+
*   4GB RAM minimum, 6GB+ recommended

***

Created for The Block Academy community. Support the amazing mod developers who make this possible! [Support the Mod Devs](https://theblock.academy/support-mod-devs?utm_source=modrinth&utm_medium=description_credits) <3
